2024-06-22T12:26:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Chatham Road South (Yau Ma Tei bound) near Hong Kong Polytechnic University is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-06-22T12:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Chatham Road South (Yau Ma Tei bound) near Hong Kong Polytechnic University which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.

2024-06-22T13:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of North West Tsing Yi Interchange (Kowloon bound) near Tsing Yi Administration Building which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
